title: Limitless Concert
description: "Limitless Concert" was designed to introduce more musical instruments into the vanilla game and to allow connections to MIDI devices for a shared musical playing experience across the entire server.
body:
"Limitless Concert" was designed to introduce more musical instruments into the vanilla game and to allow connections to MIDI devices for a shared musical playing experience across the entire server.

Don't know how to play musical instruments? No problem! This mod provides a variety of music playback options. In the future, all instruments will support automatic MIDI file parsing for playback. We've also introduced the 'Speaker' block, which can play your local music and broadcast it in real-time to all nearby players on the server. And the 'Music Player' even allows you to become a mobile speaker, taking your music on the go!
